description: Lente de Calidad: aceptacion, testeabilidad, handoff de QA y NFR/KPI.

checks.description: Acceptance criteria or success conditions are missing.
checks.why: Sin criterios de aceptacion no hay forma objetiva de declarar terminado.

checks.description: Quality or testability expectations are not explicit.
checks.why: Expectativas de calidad implicitas terminan en defectos no detectados.

checks.description: Quality handoff is not explicit enough: critical flows, edge cases, test data, regression risks, or evidence expectations are unclear.
checks.why: El handoff a QA necesita flujos criticos y datos; sin eso la regresion queda expuesta.

checks.description: NFRs, KPIs, targets, measurement method, or timeframe are not explicit enough for PRD governance.
checks.why: Sin NFR/KPI medibles el PRD no gobierna performance, seguridad ni confiabilidad.

checks.description: Quality, success, or importance is described with weak wording instead of testable criteria or measurable targets.
checks.why: Los smells de wording no bloquean madurez por si solos, pero senalan frases que parecen cerrar calidad sin hacerla verificable.
